---
applyTo: "src/features/guide/**,src/app/(protected)/guide/**"
---

Guide scope is supply-side UX: onboarding, verification intake, listings, offers, and booking operations.

Keep guide-specific components in `src/features/guide`.

Treat compliance and attestation fields as product-critical, not decorative placeholders.

Shared schemas and server contracts belong in the data layer, not page components.
